---
title: DriveWorks Administrator UI region map
sidebarTitle: DriveWorks Administrator UI region map
description: Visual map of DriveWorks Administrator chrome and major view regions with decompiled WPF names and Autex Toolkit injection targets.
---



This page names the regions of **DriveWorks Administrator** for maintainer work: what users see, what the decompiled WPF tree calls each area, and which injection surface to use when extending the product. Code identifiers below come from decompiled **23.1.0.630** (`DriveWorks.Applications.Implementation`, `DriveWorksAdministratorCore`, `DriveWorks.Applications.AdministratorViews`). Names are stable across recent releases; always confirm against the Live Visual Tree when debugging a specific build.

Use this map with the [injection guides](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection) when choosing siblings, parents, and APIs.

## Terminology bridge

DriveWorks docs and Toolkit guides use product names; decompiled XAML and reflection use different labels for the same real estate.

| User / Wiki term | Decompiled control or type | SDK or service |
| ---------------- | -------------------------- | -------------- |
| QuickBar | `QuickBar` (`DriveWorks.Applications.Support.CommandBar`) | `IQuickBarManager` |
| Command Manager | `CommandBar` | Application `ICommandBarManager`; per-view `IViewCommandBarManager` on `IViewEnvironment.CommandBarManager` |
| Command group | `ICommandBarGroup` | `AddGroup(...)` then `AddCommandButton(...)` |
| Commands registry | `CommandManager` (implementation type) | `ICommandManager` (`RegisterCommand`, `InvokeCommand`) |
| Left sidebar / ToDo tree | `ToDo` (`TreeView`), `ViewTreeViewModel` | `IViewManager`, `IViewRegistrationService` / `InsertControlViewAfter` |
| Content area | `ContentHost` (`DockPanel`) | Hosts active `IView`; WinForms views use `DriveWorksWindowsFormsHost` |
| Status bar | `StatusBar`, `StatusBarItem` children | `IStatusBarService` |
| Tree (in a view) | `CommandTreeView` | Selection, drag-drop, filter via `FilterTextBox` |
| Property grid | `PropertyGrid`, `FormDesignerPropertyGrid`, hosts | `DynamicProperty`, custom `IPropertyEditor` |

<Info>
**Command Manager** in Wiki and Toolkit docs is the **`CommandBar` WPF control**, not `ICommandManager`. Commands are registered on `ICommandManager`; buttons are placed on `CommandBar` groups.
</Info>

## Application shell (`SolidWorksWindow`)

The Administrator main window is `SolidWorksWindow` (factory: `SolidWorksChromeFactory`), XAML `solidworkswindow.xaml`. `IComponentConnector.Connect` cases 1-25 name the shell regions.

Editable source: [`administrator-ui-shell.drawio`](/images/wiki/driveworks/administrator-ui-shell.drawio).

```diagram

```

### Shell region reference

| Friendly name | Code name | WPF type / notes |
| ------------- | --------- | ---------------- |
| Application window | `MainWindow` / `SolidWorksWindow` | Root `Window` |
| Title bar chrome | `TitleCommandBarBacking` | `CommandBar`; drag and double-click maximize |
| App icon | `ApplicationIconButton` | `Button` |
| App title label | `ApplicationName` | `Label` |
| QuickBar | `QuickBar` | Populated by `State_UpdateQuickBar` / `IQuickBarManager` |
| Window buttons | `WindowsButtonsBar` | `HelpButton`, `MinimizeButton`, `MaxRestoreButton`, `CloseButton` |
| Command Manager | `CommandBar` | Merges `ICommandBarManager` groups with active view `IViewCommandBarManager` groups (`State_UpdateCommandBar`) |
| Body grid | `ApplicationBodyGrid` | `Grid` |
| Sidebar column | `TodoColumnDefinition` | `ColumnDefinition` width persistence |
| ToDo tree | `ToDo` | `TreeView` bound to `ViewTreeViewModel.RootViews` |
| Sidebar splitter | `TodoSplitter` | `GridSplitter` |
| Content host | `ContentHost` | `DockPanel`; children cleared on `ActiveViewChanged` |
| Status bar | `StatusBar` | `ReadyStateText`, `VersionState`, `BuildStatus`, `LicenseTypeStatus`, `GroupStatus`, `ProjectStatus`, `UserStatus`, `ServerStatus` |

When the active view changes, `mViewManager_ActiveViewChanged` clears `ContentHost`, mounts the new `IView`, updates `mActiveViewCommandBarManager`, and rebuilds the Command Manager bar.

## ToDo tree (views and siblings)

Sidebar items are not arbitrary WPF nodes. Each entry is a `ViewDefinition` (`Name`, `Title`, `Parent`) wrapped in `ViewDefinitionViewModel` with optional `Children`. Clicking the tree calls `IViewManager.ActivateView`.

Constants: `DriveWorks.Applications.Administrator.Extensibility.AdministratorViewNames`.

Injection uses `parentViewName` (stage) and `afterViewName` (sibling order). See [Adding a Left Sidebar Menu Item](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-sidebar-menu-item).

<details>
<summary>AdministratorViewNames reference (expand)</summary>

| Constant | `Name` value | Typical role | Typical `Parent` |
| -------- | ------------ | ------------ | ---------------- |
| `Today` | `DriveWorksToday` | Top-level view | *(empty)* |
| `Help` | `DriveWorksHelp` | Top-level view | *(empty)* |
| `Settings` | `Settings` | Top-level view | *(empty)* |
| `GroupSetup` | `GroupSetup` | Stage (Group Setup) | *(empty)* |
| `GroupOptions` | `GroupOptions` | Child view | `GroupSetup` |
| `DriveAppAdministration` | `DriveAppAdministration` | Child view | `GroupSetup` |
| `Security` | `Security` | Child view | `GroupSetup` |
| `Autopilot` | `Autopilot` | Child view | `GroupSetup` |
| `GroupTables` | `GroupTables` | Child view | `GroupSetup` |
| `GroupPersonalWebEdition` | `GroupPersonalWebEdition` | Child view | `GroupSetup` |
| `DataManagement` | `DataManagement` | Top-level / stage | *(empty)* |
| `UserInterface` | `UserInterface` | Stage (User Interface) | *(empty)* |
| `FormDesigner` | `FormDesigner` | Child view | `UserInterface` |
| `FormMessages` | `FormMessages` | Child view | `UserInterface` |
| `FormNavigation` | `FormNavigation` | Child view | `UserInterface` |
| `DataAndRules` | `DataAndRules` | Stage (Data and Rules) | *(empty)* |
| `Constants` | `Constants` | Child view | `DataAndRules` |
| `Variables` | `Variables` | Child view | `DataAndRules` |
| `DataTables` | `DataTables` | Child view | `DataAndRules` |
| `CalculationTables` | `CalculationTables` | Child view | `DataAndRules` |
| `OutputRules` | `OutputRules` | Stage (Output Rules) | *(empty)* |
| `SpecificationSettings` | `SpecificationSettings` | Child view | `OutputRules` |
| `SpecificationProperties` | `SpecificationProperties` | Child view | `OutputRules` |
| `SpecificationMacros` | `SpecificationMacros` | Child view | `OutputRules` |
| `SpecificationFlow` | `SpecificationFlow` | Child view | `OutputRules` |
| `Documents` | `FileDocuments` | Child view | `OutputRules` |
| `DisplayFiles` | `DisplayFiles` | Child view | `OutputRules` |
| `DataDocuments` | `DataDocuments` | Child view | `OutputRules` |
| `SpecificationControl` | `SpecificationControl` | Child view | `OutputRules` |
| `ModelRules` | `ModelRules` | Child view | `OutputRules` |
| `GenerationTasks` | `GenerationTasks` | Child view | `OutputRules` |
| `Documents3D` | `3DDocuments` | Child view | `OutputRules` |
| `GroupSpecification` | `GroupSpecification` | Stage / explorer | *(empty)* |
| `GroupSpecificationExplorer` | `GroupSpecificationExplorer` | Child view | `GroupSpecification` |
| `ProjectSpecification` | `ProjectSpecification` | Stage / explorer | *(empty)* |
| `ProjectSpecificationExplorer` | `ProjectSpecificationExplorer` | Child view | `ProjectSpecification` |
| `ProjectPersonalWebEdition` | `ProjectPersonalWebEdition` | Child view | `UserInterface` or project UI stage |

Parent assignments for native views follow the Administrator navigation tree shipped with the product. Plugin views (for example `AutexGroupConstants`) set `parent` explicitly at registration time. Confirm placement in the Live Visual Tree when adding siblings.

</details>

## Active view patterns (`ContentHost`)

Views hosted in `ContentHost` implement `IView`. Layout varies; three recurring shapes matter for injection.

| Archetype | Example type | Notable regions | Injection |
| --------- | ------------ | --------------- | --------- |
| Command bar + trees | `MacroFlowsViewControl` | `MacrosTree`, `ToolboxTree`, `ConditionsToolboxTree`, `CategoryFilter`, `ToolboxFilter`, `MacrosSplitter`, `ToolboxSplitter` | [View-scoped command button](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-view-scoped-command-button) |
| Web designer | `FormDesignerView` | `ControlTreeView`, `WebFormDesigner`, `DesignerPropertyGrid`, `DesignerContextMenu` | [Form Designer context menu](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-form-designer-context-menu-item), [property grid](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-form-control-properties), view command bar |
| List / grid views | `VariablesViewControl`, document admins, etc. | Often `CommandTreeView` or list + detail pane | View-scoped commands when `IViewEnvironment.CommandBarManager` is present |

`IViewEnvironment` exposes `ViewName`, `CommandManager`, and `CommandBarManager` for the active view. Form Designer may omit `CommandBarManager` while still exposing the property grid and designer context menu.

## Form Designer (`FormDesignerView`)

`FormDesignerView` (`formdesignerview.xaml`) is the **Web Form Designer** view (`AdministratorViewNames.FormDesigner`).

Editable source: [`administrator-ui-form-designer.drawio`](/images/wiki/driveworks/administrator-ui-form-designer.drawio).

```diagram

```

| Region | Code names | Injection |
| ------ | ---------- | --------- |
| View Command Manager | `IViewEnvironment.CommandBarManager` groups (zoom, test mode, alignment) | [Command Manager button](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-command-manager-button) on this view |
| Forms list | `FormListRow`, `FormsListSplitter` | â€” |
| Control tree | `ControlTreeFilterTextBox`, sort/move toolbar buttons, `ControlTreeView` | Selection drives designer |
| Canvas | `WebFormDesigner` (WebView2) | WebView bridge patterns (Toolkit: Form Designer WebView) |
| Context menu | `DesignerContextMenu`, `ConvertMenuItem` | [Form Designer context menu](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-form-designer-context-menu-item) |
| Property grid | `PropertyGridSplitter`, `PropertyGridHost`, `DesignerPropertyGrid` | [Form control properties](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-form-control-properties) |

## Rules Builder (`RulesBuilderFormWpf`)

**Rules Builder** is a separate modal `Window`, not hosted in `ContentHost`. Toolbar injection targets `MainCommandBar` via reflection.

Editable source: [`administrator-ui-rules-builder.drawio`](/images/wiki/driveworks/administrator-ui-rules-builder.drawio).

```diagram

```

| Region | Code names | Injection |
| ------ | ---------- | --------- |
| Toolbar | `MainCommandBar` | [Rules Builder toolbar button](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-rules-builder-button) |
| Editor | `RuleEditor` (`RuleEditorTextBox`), `WarningContainer` | Editor context menu (not yet documented in injection index) |
| Side references | `SideTabPanel`, `FormsPanel`, `VariablesPanel` / `VariablesTree`, `ConstantsPanel` / `ConstantsTree`, `MessagesPanel` | Built-in reference trees |
| Analysis / help | `LowerTabPanel`, `ValuesList`, `StepsList`, `DrillDownPanel`, `DynamicHelpBrowser`, `FunctionPanelHost` | Built-in tabs |

## Injection quick reference

| Region | Mechanism | Guide |
| ------ | --------- | ----- |
| `QuickBar` | `IQuickBarManager` + application `ICommandManager` | [QuickBar button](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-quickbar-button) |
| `CommandBar` (application) | `ICommandBarManager` | [Command Manager button](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-command-manager-button) |
| `CommandBar` (view) | `IViewCommandBarManager` | [View-scoped command](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-view-scoped-command-button), [virtual split](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-virtual-split-command-button) |
| `ToDo` / custom views | `IViewRegistrationService` or reflection `InsertControlViewAfter` | [Sidebar menu item](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-sidebar-menu-item) |
| `MainCommandBar` | Reflection on `RulesBuilderFormWpf` | [Rules Builder button](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-rules-builder-button) |
| `DesignerContextMenu` | WPF `ContextMenu` reflection | [Form Designer context menu](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-form-designer-context-menu-item) |
| `DesignerPropertyGrid` | `DynamicProperty.Register` + grid wrap | [Form control properties](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/add-form-control-properties) |
| Floating UI | WPF `Window` / modal | [Toolkit window](/driveworks/plugins/toolkit/injection/create-toolkit-window) |

## Diagram maintenance

| Asset | Path |
| ----- | ---- |
| Shell diagram source | `/images/wiki/driveworks/administrator-ui-shell.drawio` |
| Form Designer source | `/images/wiki/driveworks/administrator-ui-form-designer.drawio` |
| Rules Builder source | `/images/wiki/driveworks/administrator-ui-rules-builder.drawio` |

In Wiki.js, open the page in the Markdown editor and use **Insert Diagram** to replace or refresh embedded `diagram` blocks from the `.drawio` sources. The fenced `diagram` blocks on this page contain base64-encoded draw.io XML for render preview.

## Internal references

Decompiled sources (workspace, not official DriveWorks documentation):

- `Documentation/DriveWorks-Docs/decompiled/23.1.0.630/DriveWorks.Applications.Implementation.decompiled.cs` â€” `SolidWorksWindow`, `ViewTreeViewModel`, `ApplicationViewManager`
- `Documentation/DriveWorks-Docs/decompiled/23.1.0.630/DriveWorks.Applications.decompiled.cs` â€” `AdministratorViewNames`, `ICommandBarManager`, `IQuickBarManager`, `IViewManager`
- `Documentation/DriveWorks-Docs/decompiled/23.1.0.630/DriveWorks.Applications.AdministratorViews.decompiled.cs` â€” `FormDesignerView`
- `Documentation/DriveWorks-Docs/decompiled/23.1.0.630/DriveWorksAdministratorCore.decompiled.cs` â€” `RulesBuilderFormWpf`
